name: canshare-tnm-neuroendocrine-gi-pn
title: NZ AJCC neuroendocrine gastrointestinal pathological N category
description: A pathological regional lymph node stage (pN) of a neuroendocrine gastrointestional tumour before initiation of treatment, using the AJCC cancer staging manual (latest edition).
